content: We can structure a curiosity-driven autonomous ICM-based agent to evolve its exploration behavior through a three-stage progressive reinforcement learning pipeline, where each stage refines the agent’s intrinsic curiosity signal to target increasingly high-value, unobserved state spaces that align with long-term task goals. This framework matches the progressive, goal-aligned learning structure of three-stage reinforcement learning to the autonomous exploration needs of curiosity-driven agents.
